aisstream 0.0.3
  • Reference
    • Recording AIS

Normalise a single bounding box to AISStream's nested-corner form

Source: R/helpers_subscription.R
normalise_bounding_box.Rd

Accepts a box in either supported shape and returns AISStream's canonical list(c(min_lat, min_lon), c(max_lat, max_lon)) (two [lat, lon] corners):

  • a named list list(min_lat=, min_lon=, max_lat=, max_lon=) (the JS-object style), or

  • a raw nested box list(c(lat1, lon1), c(lat2, lon2)) (corner order is irrelevant; the corners are sorted into a min/max pair). Every latitude is validated to [-90, 90] and every longitude to [-180, 180].

Usage

normalise_bounding_box(box)

Arguments

box

(list) one bounding box, in either supported shape.

Value

(list) the box as list(c(min_lat, min_lon), c(max_lat, max_lon)).
